---
name: Bug Report
about: Report incorrect data, broken code, or logical errors
title: "[Bug]"
labels: bug
---

### Location

File path or directory where the issue occurs.

Example:
`research_repo/engine/edge_curves/functions_out.py`

---

### Description of Problem

Describe the bug or incorrect behavior.

---

### Evidence

Provide:

- screenshots
- quotes from files
- references to conflicting data
- line or location of bug

---

### Suggested Fix (optional)

If you have a possible correction, describe it here.
